decision.summary: Keep the live weekly 74k position unchanged and open the April 10 BTC 73k reach market on the long side.
decision.rationale: The live weekly position `will-bitcoin-reach-74k-april-6-12` Yes is only at 41.5%, so it does not qualify for take-profit and early-stage rules disable stop-loss, which means no existing position needs management. The latest Beecthor transcript and summary from 2026-04-09 still favor a short-term push into roughly 73.8k-74k before larger bearish continuation, and Binance at 72123.46 with positive 24h momentum keeps that upside thesis intact. Under nearest-strike-first, the closest valid upside target above spot for the new daily set is `will-bitcoin-reach-73k-on-april-10`; its 42.0% probability is slightly below the preferred band but still acceptable under the soft filter because the thesis is current, clear, and confirmed by price structure.
